rounds: The 6am necklace purchase — no deliberating, no asking permission, just bought it — that one's yours. Painted toes on a Saturday, standing in a chemist comparing nail shades without flinching — also yours. The joy police didn't get a word in on any of those. Sleep though? Four hours on the 22nd, nearly three hours lying awake on the 23rd — they were loud in the dark, and that cost you.
pattern: They're quietest when you're moving fast and alone — loudest when you're still and it's 3am.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt.
